events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still bringing the peace and love! Ringo Starr, the man who kept the beat for the biggest band in the world, is celebrating his birthday. What's your favourite Ringo moment or Beatles track featuring his distinctive drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs with Queen to actual astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do? What's the Queen track you crank up loudest for that signature May guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years old and still got the moves! Mick Jagger, the inimitable frontman of The Rolling Stones, is celebrating his birthday today. What's the Stones' track that always gets you moving?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music. The first video ever played? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. The irony is not lost on us. What's your most memorable MTV moment?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. That album was an instant classic. What's your standout track from their groundbreaking debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people descended on a dairy farm for three days of peace, love, and music. Woodstock 1969. Which iconic performance from the festival do you wish you'd witnessed live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world mourned the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago, we lost a true icon. Elvis Presley's impact on music and culture is still felt today. What's the one Elvis song that always makes you stop and listen?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (1996)
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, tragically dying six days later.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a profound voice. Tupac Shakur's influence continues to resonate. What's your favourite track from the legendary artist?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: On this day in 1970, the world lost guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we said goodbye to a true pioneer. Jimi Hendrix redefined what was possible with a guitar. What's his most electrifying performance or track in your opinion?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Abbey Road
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary, let alone the music within. What's your go-to track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and attitude have fronted The Pretenders for decades. What's your favourite track from this rock icon?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid is 54! Happy Birthday to Liam Gallagher, whose swagger and vocals defined a generation. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine', a timeless call for peace and unity. Its message still resonates deeply today. What does this iconic song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: The Original iPod
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod and changed how we listen to music forever. Who remembers painstakingly syncing their entire CD collection onto one of these beauties? What was the first album you loaded onto your iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, 007 has been entertaining us for decades. Who's your favourite Bond actor, and which theme song is the ultimate?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: On this day, we remember John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the extraordinary talent of John Lennon, who would have turned 86 today. His songs continue to inspire and challenge us. What's the John Lennon lyric that means the most to you?
